steps.title: Identify the singular antecedent
steps.content: The sentence introduces the singular noun “Water” as the subject. In the second clause, the rotation of Earth and interference cause ____ to swirl into a whirlpool. This blank must refer to “Water.” Since “Water” is singular, the pronoun must be singular to match.

steps.title: Apply number agreement
steps.content: A pronoun must match its antecedent in number. It is the only singular pronoun among the choices. These, those, and them are all plural forms that would violate this rule. That matches choice D — D is correct.
